block.header: sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu opo mikoto wo mi kwo tati opo kimi tati omi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,1@大命乎親王等王等臣等百官乃人等天下公民衆聞食止宣,*

sentence.transcription: sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu

sentence.kanji: 大命乎親王等王等臣等百官乃人等天下公民衆聞食止宣
sentence.transcription: opo mikoto wo mi kwo tati opo kimi tati omi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: ware tutana ku wodina ku site ama tu pi tugi wo uke tamapari te tosi pisasi ku kasanari nu

sentence.transcription: ware tutana ku wodina ku site
ama tu pi tugi wo uke tamapari te
tosi pisasi ku kasanari nu

block.header: sikaru ni yo ki maturi goto siki ni kake te ame no sita e wosame zu nari nu

sentence.transcription: sikaru ni yo ki
maturi goto siki ni kake te
ame no sita e wosame zu nari nu

block.header: sika nomwi ni ara zu moto ywori kaze no yamapi ni kurusimi tutu opo mi mwi yasu kara zu

sentence.transcription: sika nomwi ni ara zu
moto ywori kaze no yamapi ni kurusimi tutu
opo mi mwi yasu kara zu

block.header: mata tosi mo iya taka ku nari nite nokori no inoti ikubaku mo ara zu

sentence.transcription: mata tosi mo iya taka ku nari nite
nokori no inoti ikubaku mo ara zu

block.header: ima omoposa ku ko no kurawi pa sari te simaraku no ma mo opo mi mwi yasinapa mu to namo omoposu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV;@3,IP-ADV,1@暫間毛御体欲養止奈毛所念湏,*

sentence.transcription: ima omoposa ku ko no kurawi pa sari te

sentence.kanji: 暫間毛御体欲養止奈毛所念湏
sentence.transcription: simaraku no ma mo opo mi mwi yasinapa mu to namo omoposu

block.header: kare koko wo motite pi tugi no mi kwo to sadame tamap ye ru yama pye no mi kwo ni ame no sita no maturi goto pa saduke tama pu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-DAT,NP,2@山部親王尔天下政波授賜布,*

sentence.transcription: kare koko wo motite
pi tugi no mi kwo to sadame tamap ye ru

sentence.kanji: 山部親王尔天下政波授賜布
sentence.transcription: yama pye no mi kwo ni ame no sita no maturi goto pa saduke tama pu

block.header: inisipye no pito ni ip yeru koto ari kwo wo siru pa oya to ip yeri to namo kikosi myesu

sentence.transcription: inisipye no pito ni ip yeru koto ari
kwo wo siru pa oya to
ip yeri to
namo kikosi myesu

block.header: ko no opo kimi pa waka ki toki yori asita yupubye to ware ni sitagapi te ima ni itaru made okotaru koto na ku tukape maturu wo mire ba ninkeu atu ki opo kimi ni ari to namo kamu nagara sira si myesu

sentence.transcription: ko no opo kimi pa waka ki
toki yori asita yupubye to
ware ni sitagapi te
ima ni itaru made
okotaru
koto na ku tukape maturu wo mire ba
ninkeu atu ki
opo kimi ni ari to namo
kamu nagara sira si myesu

block.header: sore ninkeu pa pyakugyau no moto nari

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@其仁孝者百行之基奈利,*

sentence.kanji: 其仁孝者百行之基奈利
sentence.transcription: sore ninkeu pa pyakugyau no moto nari

block.header: somo somo pyaku soku no musi no sinuru ni itarite mo kutu kapyera nu koto pa tasuke wo opo mi to namo kikosi myesu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@曾毛曾毛百足之虫乃至死,*

sentence.kanji: 曾毛曾毛百足之虫乃至死
sentence.transcription: somo somo pyaku soku no musi no sinuru ni itarite mo
kutu kapyera nu
koto pa tasuke wo opo mi to
namo kikosi myesu

block.header: moro moro kaku no sama satori te kiywo ku napo ki kokoro wo moti ko no opo kimi wo tasuke mitibiki te ame no sita no opo mi takara wo nade yasinapa simu be si to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,4@天下百姓乎可令撫育止宣,*

sentence.transcription: moro moro kaku no sama satori te
kiywo ku napo ki
kokoro wo moti
ko no opo kimi wo tasuke mitibiki te

sentence.kanji: 天下百姓乎可令撫育止宣
sentence.transcription: ame no sita no opo mi takara wo nade yasinapa simu be si to noritamapu

block.header: mata nori tamapa ku kaku no toki ni atari tutu pito bito yokara nu pakari koto wo omopi te ame no sita wo mo midari ono ga udi kadwo wo mo porobosu pito domo mane ku ari

sentence.transcription: mata nori tamapa ku
kaku no toki ni atari tutu
pito bito yokara nu
pakari koto wo omopi te
ame no sita wo mo midari
ono ga udi kadwo wo mo porobosu
pito domo mane ku ari

block.header: mosi kaku ara mu pito woba ono ga wosipe omobuke wosipe naposi te ono mo ono mo ono ga oya no kadwo porobosa zu iya taka ni tukape maturi tuga mu to omopi tutusimi te kiywo ku napo ki kokoro wo moti te tukape maturu be si to namo omoposi mye su

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,7@仕奉倍之止奈毛所念湏,*

sentence.transcription: mosi kaku ara mu

sentence.kanji: 人乎婆己我教化訓直弖
sentence.transcription: pito woba ono ga wosipe omobuke wosipe naposi te
ono mo ono mo ono ga oya no kadwo porobosa zu
iya taka ni
tukape maturi tuga mu to omopi tutusimi te
kiywo ku napo ki
kokoro wo moti te

sentence.kanji: 仕奉倍之止奈毛所念湏
sentence.transcription: tukape maturu be si to namo omoposi mye su

block.header: ame taka kye domo pikiki ni kiku mono so to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,3@天皇我御命乎衆諸聞食止宣,*

sentence.transcription: ame taka kye domo
pikiki ni kiku
mono so to noritamapu

sentence.kanji: 天皇我御命乎衆諸聞食止宣
sentence.transcription: sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu
